rationale.root_cause: The response correctly describes the missing high-byte check in _yr_scan_wicompare but identifies the defect at scan.c:199 instead of the required location scan.c:196.
rationale.local_fix: The suggested code change exactly restores the high-byte check `*(s1 + 1) == 0x00` in the while condition, matching the developer patch.
rationale.global_fix: The response explains the underlying cause (missing UTF-16 high-byte validation allowing non-ASCII wide characters to match ASCII low bytes) and proposes centralizing the invariant, satisfying the global-fix requirement.
